mapper.insert: INSERT INTO time_axis ( parameter_id, count, resolution, unit, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{parameterId}, #{count}, #{resolution}, #{unit}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, parameter_id AS parameterId, count, resolution, unit, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM time_axis WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, parameter_id AS parameterId, count, resolution, unit, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM time_axis WHERE parameter_id = #{parameterId}
